channel.title: CCJ on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in CCJ on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Sunday Brief: Georgetown Flood, Karpowership Extension & The Streets That Used To Be Ours
item.description: Georgetown flooded again, the powerships are staying longer than expected, the government and the Mayor are fighting over who owns the streets, and Rihanna's makeup is now available in Guyana. Sunday, bai.

item.title: Wednesday's Guyana Brief: Noem Lands, Exxon Expands, and the Bridge Is Still Sinking
item.description: A fired US official arrives as a Special Envoy, Exxon wants two more oil projects, and the World Bank says Guyana's reform programme has been quietly gutted. Wednesday's 5-minute news circus.

item.title: Caribbean Brief: Jamaica Counting Hurricane Damage, T&T Gets a US List, and Sandals Is Spending Big
item.description: Tuesday's regional roundup: Jamaica's budget fight, Trinidad's US persons-of-interest list, Sandals drops $200M, and Caribbean AIDS deaths fall 60%.
